hero.designNotes: A romantic festival-map hero with luxury parchment gradients, glass event markers, dotted route lines, and oversized editorial typography. It references the Gujarati celebration through the provided wording and event journey while keeping the visual language modern and decorative rather than overtly religious.
hero.html:
A wedding festival in Somerset

Kavya & Mihir

March 22, 2026

Akshar Grand Palace
Somerset, New Jersey

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.
